description: Quick Fix Mode briefing checkpoint: a deterministic, stateless Node command hook on ExitPlanMode. It ONLY enforces inside a spec-driven Quick Fix cycle (detected by a design-reviewer subagent invocation in the cycle) — plain plan mode is never affected. When in scope it allows when a real user reply immediately precedes the call (turn-final Plan Briefing flow) and blocks a straight plan-write -> ExitPlanMode skip. Fail-open on any uncertainty, so it never deadlocks or breaks plan mode. Reads the transcript only; writes nothing anywhere.
